allow: Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-ChildItem -Recurse src | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | Sort-Object')

Bash(powershell -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path src\\app\\\(dashboard\)\\clients\\new, 'src\\app\\\(dashboard\)\\clients\\[id]', 'src\\app\\\(dashboard\)\\clients\\[id]\\edit', src\\hooks, src\\lib\\constants | Out-Null; Write-Host 'dirs created'")
